name: cancelButtonProps
en-US: Props for the cancel button

name: cancelText
en-US: Text for the cancel button

name: centered
en-US: Whether to center the modal vertically

name: children
en-US: Children (modal content)

name: className
en-US: Custom class name

name: classNames
zh-CN: 语义化类名，支持按 slot 自定义
en-US: Semantic class names by slot

name: closable
zh-CN: 是否可关闭，传入对象可配置关闭图标、禁用及回调
en-US: Whether the modal is closable, pass an object to configure close icon, disabled state and callbacks

name: confirmButtonProps
en-US: Props for the confirm button

name: confirmLoading
en-US: Loading state of the confirm button

name: confirmText
en-US: Text for the confirm button

name: focusable
zh-CN: 是否可聚焦，传入对象可配置焦点捕获与返回
en-US: Whether the modal is focusable, pass an object to configure focus trap and return

name: footer
type: (element: ReactNode, params: { confirmButton: ReactNode; cancelButton: ReactNode }) => ReactNode
zh-CN: 底部内容，支持自定义渲染函数
en-US: Footer content, supports custom render function

name: fresh
zh-CN: 关闭后仍更新 modal 内容
en-US: Keep updating modal content after close

name: getContainer
en-US: Specify the container to mount the modal

name: isOpen
en-US: Whether the modal is visible

name: keyboard
zh-CN: 是否支持 Esc 键关闭
en-US: Whether to close on Esc key press

name: mask
en-US: Whether to show the mask

name: maskClosable
en-US: Whether to close on mask click

name: mountOnEnter
zh-CN: 进入动画开始时挂载节点
en-US: Mount the node on enter transition

name: onCancel
en-US: Callback when the modal is cancelled

name: onClosed
en-US: Callback after the modal is fully closed

name: onOk
en-US: Callback when the modal is confirmed

name: onOpened
en-US: Callback after the modal is fully opened

name: prefixCls
en-US: Custom class name prefix

name: slots
en-US: Custom slot rendering

name: style
en-US: Custom style

name: styles
zh-CN: 语义化样式，支持按 slot 自定义
en-US: Semantic styles by slot

name: title
en-US: Modal title

name: transitions
zh-CN: 动效配置，支持 mask 和 content 分别设置
en-US: Transition configuration for mask and content

name: unmountOnExit
zh-CN: 退出动画结束后卸载节点
en-US: Unmount the node on exit transition

name: width
zh-CN: 弹窗宽度，支持响应式断点配置
en-US: Modal width, supports responsive breakpoint configuration

name: zIndex
en-US: Modal z-index
